summary: A compact rectangular storage or utility building with a gable roof. The structure features a stone brick foundation and frame, wooden plank walls with log corner posts, and a dark wood shingle roof. A single window opening is visible on the front facade. The building sits on a raised stone brick platform.
rebuild_hints: Build a 8×6 block rectangular footprint with stone brick foundation
Construct raised stone brick platform around perimeter
Place wooden plank walls on foundation, approximately 3 blocks high
Add log posts at all four corners for structural detail
Install a gable roof using dark brick/wood blocks, peaked at center
Create a single window opening on front face with stone brick frame
Ensure roof overhangs slightly beyond walls on all sides
Add stone brick trim band between wall and roof sections
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and placement precision uncertain from angles provided
Interior layout and floor composition not visible
Precise roof pitch angle estimated from perspective views
Whether roof is solid blocks or stairs/slabs for slope detail
Exact height of foundation platform (appears 1-2 blocks)
Door presence or location not clearly visible in any view
